attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WIUN.TRANSACTION_TYPE,
CASE 
  --WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG IN 'Y' AND NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM<=DATE  THEN 'Y'
  WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE<>'SERVICE' THEN 
  CASE WHEN   WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG ='Y' THEN  WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG 
  WHEN     DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT <=DATE AND WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM  IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END   
  WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 
   CASE WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT >DATE THEN 'N'
       WHEN ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT >DATE THEN 'N'
    WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT IS NOT NULL AND  PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
       WHEN ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT IS NOT NULL AND  ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
    WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT IS  NULL AND NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM <=DATE THEN 'Y'
      WHEN ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT IS  NULL AND NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM <=DATE THEN 'Y'
      ELSE 'N'    END END   RPO_FLG ,
 WIUN.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
 WIUN.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
 WIUN.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
 WIUN.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
 WIUN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 WIUN.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 WIUN.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
 WIUN.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WIUN.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WIUN.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
 WIUN.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 WIUN.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 WIUN.CORP_FLG                      ,
 WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
 WIUN.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
 WIUN.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
 WIUN.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
 WIUN.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
 WIUN.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
 WIUN.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
 WIUN.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
 WIUN.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
 WIUN.PROCESS_DT                    ,
 WIUN.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
 WIUN.HOLD_FLG                      ,
 WIUN.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
 WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
 WIUN.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
 WIUN.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
 WIUN.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
 WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
 WIUN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 WIUN.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
 WIUN.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
 WIUN.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 WIUN.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
 WIUN.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
 WIUN.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
 WIUN.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE' THEN COALESCE(PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT,ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT) /*PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT*/ ELSE NULL END AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DATE,
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE' THEN COALESCE(PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_COMPLETION_DT,ERP_DT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT) /*PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_COMPLETION_DT*/ ELSE NULL END AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DATE  ,
 NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM  AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
 NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM  AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
 COALESCE(CASE WHEN AR.ACCOUNTING_RULE='UNKNOWN' AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE' THEN 'Immediate'
 WHEN AR.ACCOUNTING_RULE='UNKNOWN' AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE' AND DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Immediate' 
 WHEN AR.ACCOUNTING_RULE='UNKNOWN' AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE' AND DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DATE IS NULL THEN 'Daily Rates'
 ELSE AR.ACCOUNTING_RULE
 END ,EL.ACCOUNTING_RULE,NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'Daily Rates') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 COALESCE(AR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,EL.DURATION) AS DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT , 
 COALESCE(AVG_TM.AVG_TERM,21) AS DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT ,
 
CASE WHEN CAST(AUTO_RELEASE_DT AS DATE)> CURRENT_DATE  THEN  AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
                                         WHEN DV_MILESTONE_END_DT >CURRENT_DATE THEN DV_MILESTONE_END_DT
                                         WHEN DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DATE >CURRENT_DATE THEN DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DATE
                                         WHEN CAST (CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)>CURRENT_DATE THEN CAST (CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)
                                         ELSE 
                                         CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE NOT IN ('SERVICE') AND WIUN.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT >CURRENT_DATE THEN WIUN.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT ELSE RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE+1 END  
                                          END DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,    
        
 CASE WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)
 WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND CONTRACT_TERM IS NOT NULL THEN   DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT  
 WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND CONTRACT_TERM IS   NULL AND DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT >=DATE  THEN DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
 WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND CONTRACT_TERM IS   NULL THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE+1  
 END DV_WATERFALL_START_DT,
 
 
 CASE WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NOT NULL THEN CONTRACT_END_DTM 
 WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND CONTRACT_TERM IS NOT NULL THEN    DV_WATERFALL_START_DT + ((CONTRACT_TERM*30.41667))-1
 WHEN (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND CONTRACT_TERM IS NULL AND DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT IS NOT NULL THEN  
 DV_WATERFALL_START_DT + ( ROUND(DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT)*30.416667)-1 
 WHEN/* (CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE)-CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE))  IS NULL  AND*/ CONTRACT_TERM IS NULL AND DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT IS NULL THEN 
 DV_WATERFALL_START_DT + ((DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT)*30.416667)-1 
 END DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,
 
  
 CAST(CASE WHEN ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST(  DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) -  CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER)) AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) =0 THEN 1
 ELSE ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST( DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) - CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER))+1 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) END AS INTEGER) DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT ,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WIUN.sales_order_line_key) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 COALESCE(MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,'='),
 WIUN.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
 WIUN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 ERP_DT.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT ,
 ERP_DT.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT ,
 WIUN.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
 WIUN.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 WIUN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
 WIUN.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
 WIUN.TSV_FLAG,
 WIUN.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID,
CASE
WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE<>'SERVICE' THEN
CASE WHEN   WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG ='Y' THEN  WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG
WHEN     DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT <=DATE AND WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM  IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END
WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN
CASE WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT >DATE THEN 'N'
WHEN WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT >DATE THEN 'N'
WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT IS NOT NULL AND  PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
WHEN WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT IS NOT NULL AND  WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
WHEN PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT IS  NULL
AND (WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM  IS NOT NULL and WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM<=DATE) THEN 'Y'
WHEN WIUN.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT IS  NOT NULL
AND (WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM  IS NOT NULL and WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM<=DATE) THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'    END END   DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/
 FROM 
 --(SEL CALENDAR_DATE, FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE, FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR  WHERE  CALENDAR_DATE=DATE ) RFM,
 $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP WIUN
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WIUN.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP_DT ERP_DT
ON  ERP_DT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND ERP_DT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY=WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT MIN(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,MAX(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,SALES_ORDER_KEY,SS_CODE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 3,4) NSOL
 ON WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND WIUN.DD_FB_SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_START_DT,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_COMPLETION_DT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP NSO
 INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SOL_WITH_AS_PROJECT PROJSO
 ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=PROJSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$ASBIVWDB.MT_AS_PROJECT PROJ
 ON PROJ.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD=PROJSO.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD
 AND PROJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLG   ='Y'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY PROJ.END_TV_DT ,PROJ.EDW_UPDATE_DTM   DESC)=1
 ) PROJDT
 ON WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=PROJDT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 
 --acc rule derivation
 LEFT JOIN 
 (SEL SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,ITEM_KEY,  ACCOUNTING_RULE, ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL WHERE 1=1 AND TRX_SRC_CD='OM' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION  BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,ITEM_KEY ORDER BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID desc)=1)AR
 ON   AR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  =WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND AR.ITEM_KEY=WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
       
 /*
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SKU, ACCOUNTING_RULE,DURATION 
  FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU WHERE END_DATE IS NULL)EL 
 ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EL.SKU
  */
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT EL.SKU,/*BIZ_DEF_TERM,*/EL.ACCOUNTING_RULE,EL.DURATION 
   FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU EL
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU ST --to ignore the active records that are closed in src system
   ON ST.SKU_ID=EL.SKU_ID     WHERE ST.END_DATE IS NULL )EL 
  ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EL.SKU
  
 
 LEFT JOIN (
 SEL DISTINCT ITEM_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM 
 WHERE ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ( 'IMMEDIATE' , 'DAILY RATES' )
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ITEM_KEY ORDER BY  SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ASC , EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1
 )NII
 ON WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY =NII.ITEM_KEY
 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DFR_GROSS_UNBILLED_AVG_TERM AVG_TM
 ON AVG_TM.BUSINESS_UNIT=WIUN.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID 
 AND COALESCE(AVG_TM.END_DATE ,DATE)>=DATE -- coalesce to qualify one active record per BU
 
 LEFT JOIN (
   SEL   SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    ='ERP'
AND CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG NOT IN ('=')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT DESC ,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  DESC)=1
   ) MSR
  ON MSR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  =WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           =WIUN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
  AND MSR.PRODUCT_KEY                   =WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY    

  WHERE  1=1
 AND TRANSACTION_TYPE='ERP'

SELECT
TRANSACTION_TYPE              
,RPO_FLG                       
,UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          
,PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          
,RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_MTH                   
,SRC_ENTITY                    
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WEB_ORDER_ID                  
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,SERVICE_FLG                   
,CORP_FLG                      
,CONTRACT_START_DTM            
,CONTRACT_END_DTM              
,CONTRACT_TERM                 
,CONTRACT_NUM                  
,ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,AUTO_RELEASE_DT               
,FHI_BNI_FLG                   
,CISCO_BOOKED_DT               
,ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               
,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT AS PROCESS_DT                   
,SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             
,HOLD_FLG                      
,EARLY_SHIP_FLG                
,SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      
,CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      
,DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,DD_FB_SS_CD                   
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   
,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT            
,DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT                  
,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            
,DV_WATERFALL_START_DT            
,DV_WATERFALL_END_DT              
,DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT
,30 AS  DAYS_IN_MTH 
,UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT AS WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,0 DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,-1 MONTH_AGE
,CAST(1  AS INTEGER) AS DEPTH
,WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
,0 AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT
,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP_WF_AT WF 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFM
   ON RFM.CALENDAR_DATE = WF.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT
  WHERE WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN('Immediate','Immediate - NRST')
  AND WF.TSV_FLAG NOT IN ('Y')

SELECT  
'ERP' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
/*CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y'  
WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <>'SERVICE' THEN 
CASE WHEN  ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD IN ('Service','Software')   AND MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD  IN ('Term','Usage') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END  END AS*/ 
'N' AS RPO_FLG,
CAST(((COALESCE(ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100)*SCAA.DV_FB_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) AS DECIMAL(26, 7) )  AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
SCAA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,
SCAA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MTH,'Cisco' AS SRC_ENTITY,
COALESCE(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
--NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' AND NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE   NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
-999 AS WEB_ORDER_ID,
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SCAA.DD_FB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE(ECUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_CORP_FINANCE_BACKLOG_FLG,'=') AS CORP_FLG, 
CASE WHEN NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME>='2020-08-16 00:00:00' AND NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT 
ELSE NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM END AS CONTRACT_START_DTM,
CASE WHEN NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME>='2020-08-16 00:00:00' AND NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT
ELSE NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM  END AS CONTRACT_END_DTM,
CASE WHEN ( CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE ) - CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE ) )  IS   NOT NULL 
  THEN  CAST((CAST(CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) )
										   WHEN  SOLTV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT > 0
															THEN SOLTV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
ELSE NULL END CONTRACT_TERM,


/*WHEN ( NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'SWOA%' OR  NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%ADJ%' ) AND NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE 'SWOA-MX%' THEN NULL
ELSE CASE
WHEN NP.PRICING_UNIT_NAME = 'YEAR' THEN NP.PRICING_UNIT_DURATION_INT * 12 
WHEN NP.PRICING_UNIT_NAME = 'MONTHS' THEN NP.PRICING_UNIT_DURATION_INT  
WHEN EL.BIZ_DEF_TERM IS NOT NULL THEN EL.BIZ_DEF_TERM
WHEN EL.DURATION IS NOT NULL THEN EL.DURATION
ELSE NULL
END 
END  CONTRACT_TERM ,May20 Fy18 rel change */
NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,
COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  ERP_DEAL_ID,
CAST ( SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM AS DATE ) AS  AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
CASE WHEN SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM IS NULL OR AUTO_RELEASE_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
THEN 'BNI' ELSE 'FHI' END AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,              
NSOB.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM   AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT, 
NSOB.DD_FB_SCHEDULED_SHIPMENT_DT AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_HOLD_FLG,'=') AS HOLD_FLG,
COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,      
COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,'=') AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,
NSOL.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE (NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
CAST(
TRIM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
TRIM(NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
TRIM(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||   
TRIM(COALESCE(NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)
	   ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,      
--CAST((NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE * (COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) * COALESCE(CAST(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
Cast((NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' THEN NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ELSE NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE * (Coalesce(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) END  * (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) * Coalesce(Cast(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
NSF.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
CAST(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS CONVERSION_RATE,
NSOB.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM, 
NSOB.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT AS PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT,

 --COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,

 Cast(Coalesce(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,         
 'S' TSV_FLAG,
 'N' AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG,

$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_FINANCE_BACKLOG_TV NSOB

 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
	 ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1

 =SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

CASE WHEN  ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD IN ('Service','Software')   AND MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD  IN ('Term','Usage') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END  END AS*/

										   WHEN  SOLTV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT > 0

/*




WHEN ( NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'SWOA%' OR  NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%ADJ%' ) AND NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE 'SWOA-MX%' THEN NULL
ELSE CASE

ELSE NULL
END 
END  CONTRACT_TERM ,May20 Fy18 rel change */

RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
SCAA.DD_FB_ORDER_QTY  AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,

CAST(COALESCE(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,

 'N' AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG

 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')

,CASE WHEN RU_BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID IN 'AS FIXED' THEN DT3.SCHEDULED_FINISH_DATE      ELSE NULL END ASF_MILESTONE_END_DATE

,COALESCE(MILESTONE_START_DATE,MCC_MILESTONE_START_DATE,HLD_MILESTONE_START_DATE,ASF_MILESTONE_START_DATE) AS DV_MILESTONE_START_DT
,COALESCE(MILESTONE_END_DATE,MCC_MILESTONE_END_DATE,HLD_MILESTONE_END_DATE,ASF_MILESTONE_END_DATE) AS DV_MILESTONE_END_DT

,COALESCE( PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_START_DT,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT )  AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,COALESCE( PROJDT.AS_PROJECT_COMPLETION_DT,DV_MILESTONE_END_DATE )  AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
FROM   $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP WIUN
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY=WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY   
AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE'
AND (CONTRACT_START_DTM            IS NULL OR CONTRACT_END_DTM              IS NULL) 

LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_START_DT,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_COMPLETION_DT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP NSO
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SOL_WITH_AS_PROJECT PROJSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=PROJSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ASBIVWDB.MT_AS_PROJECT PROJ
ON PROJ.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD=PROJSO.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD
AND PROJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLG   ='Y'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY PROJ.END_TV_DT ,PROJ.EDW_UPDATE_DTM   DESC,NSO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY desc)=1
) PROJDT
ON WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=PROJDT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL1
ON SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SOL1.SS_CODE='CG'

LEFT  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_SO_MASTER ELM
ON ELM.SO_LINE_ID =SOL1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND ELM.SO_LINE_NUMBER  =SOL1.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT

LEFT  JOIN 
(SEL SO_ID,SERVICE_PRG_ID,PROJECT_NUMBER FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_DIST 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SO_ID ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           DESC,SERVICE_PRG_ID desc)=1)ELD
ON ELM.SO_ID=ELD.SO_ID

LEFT   JOIN (
SEL DISTINCT PROJ_ELEMENT_ID,SCHEDULED_START_DATE,SCHEDULED_finish_DATE FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCH  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROJ_ELEMENT_ID ORDER BY PROJ_ELEMENT_ID DESC)=1)DTD
ON DTD.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID=ELD.SERVICE_PRG_ID

 LEFT JOIN ( 
SEL SO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,TASK_ID FROM
$$GGSRCVWDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS  WHERE SO_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC,TASK_ID desc)=1
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4  
)  MSP
ON MSP.SO_NUMBER=SOL1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
AND  MSP.SO_LINE_NUMBER=SOL1.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT 

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCH  DT
ON DT.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID=MSP.TASK_ID

LEFT JOIN 
(SEL SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATE, BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,	BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,TASK_ID
FROM
(SEL
HOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME  AS DATE) SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD HOLD 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE LINE
ON LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          =HOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         
  AND LINE.SS_CODE='CG'
  AND HOLD.SS_CODE='CG'

WHERE 1=1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME AS DATE)  ORDER BY       RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME DESC,LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY desc )   =1
)D
INNER JOIN  (SEL SO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,TASK_ID  FROM
$$GGSRCVWDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS  WHERE SO_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC, TASK_ID desc)=1) HD1
ON HD1.SO_NUMBER=D.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND HD1.SO_LINE_NUMBER=D.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY   SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATE, 	BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ORDER BY    BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,TASK_ID  DESC)=1
) SOL3 
ON   SOL3.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SOL1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND SOL3.SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATE=SOL1.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCH  DT2
ON DT2.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID=SOL3.TASK_ID

LEFT JOIN (
SEL    ATTRIBUTE1 SO_NUM,
ATTRIBUTE3 SO_LINE, 
ATTRIBUTE2 PID ,  
PROJECT_ID,
TASK_ID,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_EVENTS EL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
ON CAST(SOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(20))=ATTRIBUTE1
AND CAST(SOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT          AS VARCHAR(20))=ATTRIBUTE3
AND SS_CODE='CG'
WHERE EVENT_TYPE IN 'REVENUE'
AND ATTRIBUTE1 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ATTRIBUTE1,ATTRIBUTE3 ORDER BY  TASK_ID DESC)=1)PA
ON PA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

LEFT JOIN (SEL DISTINCT SCHEDULED_START_DATE, SCHEDULED_FINISH_DATE,PROJ_ELEMENT_ID FROM   $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCH  WHERE PROJ_ELEMENT_ID IS NOT NULL)  DT3
ON DT3.PROJ_ELEMENT_ID=PA.TASK_ID

WHERE 1=1

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)=1

SELECT  
 'ERP' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
 'N' AS RPO_FLG,
  CAST(((COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100.000000)* Cast(Coalesce(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) *
  (NPBS.BILL_LOCAL_AMT) * COALESCE(CAST(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26, 7) )  AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,  
 SCAA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,
 SCAA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_MTH,
 'Cisco' AS SRC_ENTITY,
 COALESCE(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
 SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 -999 AS WEB_ORDER_ID,
 NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 SCAA.DD_FB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(ECUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999),
 CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_CORP_FINANCE_BACKLOG_FLG,'=') AS CORP_FLG, 
 NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM     AS CONTRACT_START_DTM,
 NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM     AS CONTRACT_END_DTM,
CAST((CAST(CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) AS CONTRACT_TERM,
 NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,
 COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  ERP_DEAL_ID,
 NPBS.DV_BILL_REL_TO_INVOICING_DT AS  AUTO_RELEASE_DT,/*ADDED AS PART OF FLEXI AUG RELEASE */
--NPBS.DV_INVOICE_DT END AS  AUTO_RELEASE_DT, 
 CASE WHEN NPBS.DV_INVOICE_DT IS NULL OR AUTO_RELEASE_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
 THEN 'BNI' ELSE 'FHI' END AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
 SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,              
 NSOB.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM   AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,
 RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT, 
 '1900-01-01' AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT, 
 COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_HOLD_FLG,'=') AS HOLD_FLG,
 COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,      
 COALESCE(SCAA.DV_FB_SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,'=') AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,
 NSOL.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 COALESCE (NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ,
 COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 CAST(
 TRIM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
 TRIM(NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
 TRIM(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||   
 TRIM(COALESCE(NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)
     ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,      
 Cast((NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' THEN NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ELSE NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE * (Coalesce(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100.00000) END  * (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) * Coalesce(Cast(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
 NSF.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 CAST(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS CONVERSION_RATE,
 NSOB.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM, 
 NSOB.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT AS PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT,
 SCAA.DD_FB_SS_CD AS SS_CD,
 RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
 ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 SCAA.DD_FB_ORDER_QTY  AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY, 
/*  CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH'  THEN 
  Cast((NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) * Coalesce(Cast(SCAA.CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
 ELSE  Cast((NSO,B.DV_FB_BASE_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT* (Coalesce(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, */
 0 AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
  Cast(Coalesce (NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) *(Coalesce(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT, 
  Cast(Coalesce(SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
 'N' AS TSV_FLAG,
 NPBS.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT  AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID  ,
  'N' AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG,
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_FINANCE_BACKLOG_TV NSOB
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_FINANCE_BACKLOG SCAA
 ON SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SCAA.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY=NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_FINANCE_BACKLOG_TV   NSF
 ON (SCAA.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSF.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
 AND NSF.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'       )
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE NPBS
 ON NPBS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NPBS.BK_SS_CD=NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD
 
 LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION NSOA
 ON NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN 'ATTRIBUTED'
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY)=NP.ITEM_KEY
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
 ON COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY)=RP.ITEM_KEY
 --AND BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID  LIKE 'ATSBU'
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=SCAA.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 
 INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
  DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
  QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
   ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
 ) ALCTN
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY 
 AND ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')                                         
 
   /*
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SKU,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,DURATION,BIZ_DEF_TERM FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU WHERE END_DATE IS NULL)EL 
 ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EL.SKU
 --May20 Fy18 rel change
 */
 
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON  CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' AND NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE   NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END 
  
 =NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSOB.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD=NSO.SS_CODE  
 
  LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV
  ON 
  CASE WHEN NSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN 'NOAH' AND NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 THEN NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ELSE   NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END 
  =SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD=SOLTV.SS_CODE 
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV SOTV
 ON NSOB.DD_FB_SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD=SOTV.SS_CD   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER ECUST
 ON NSOB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ECUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD=ECUST.SS_CODE 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
 ON COALESCE(ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,NSOB.DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY)=NPPT.ITEM_KEY
 AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'  
 AND CAST(NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT.END_TV_DATE    
 
 WHERE NSOB.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'
 AND SCAA.DV_FB_CORP_FINANCE_BACKLOG_FLG = 'Y'
 AND SCAA.DD_FB_SS_CD  NOT IN ('AE')
 AND NSOB.DD_FB_SS_CD NOT IN ('OPL')
 AND NPBS.BILLING_STATUS_NAME NOT IN ('INVOICED','CANCELLED')
